who: HR generalists in small to medium-sized tech companies using Greenhouse for hiring
offer: For HR generalists in small to medium-sized tech companies processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire productivity. We streamline onboarding tasks instead of manual tracking and email communication.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in new hire productivity.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR generalists seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on onboarding solutions
DM outreach to HR generalists with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try New hire paperwork management and IT setup checklist on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the onboarding workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Allow CSV import for existing hire data
Enable one-click export of onboarding reports
Reduce steps required in the onboarding process
